title: Disable "Previous Replies" Button?

posts.author: ethancreveling (Ethan Dust)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please incorporate a feature where you can disable the “Previous replies” button on the updates tab of any given item.

Before this update, users could sift through all of the replies simply by scrolling. Now if a thread gets long, it is hidden in a previous replies function. My team has expressed that they do not like this addition as it slows them down from finding information.

What are you trying to achieve

We are trying to have this feature be offered as a toggle so we can turn it off and disable it.
